name: Bridge School

tutorial.primaryLesson: Use a Blocker to turn the crowd away from the Styx, then assign Builders to create a short rib-bone bridge/stair over the intended gap.
jobHints: 1: Blocker turns skeleton traffic around; click a blocker again to Resume March.
2: Builder places six small bridge/stair pieces in the direction the skeleton is facing, then resumes walking.

notes: Current prototype layout is a blocker/ledge-death test: minions spawn on the right side of the platform and march left. Session B should add Builder v0 using scene collision pieces; Session C should tune the layout into the intended Blocker + Builder solution where the blocker buys time and builders close the route without interacting with the River Styx.
